chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-202 of 2021 Muhammad Imran & others Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on Misc. No.744/21 3. For orders on Misc. No.745/21 4. For hearing of main case Dated: 15.01.2021 Mr. Muhammad Khan Lakho for petitioners. -.-.- Learned counsel for petitioners submits that the Evacuee Trust Board is otherwise calculating and assessing the arrears of rent and the actual current rent payable as of now hence in process of legitimizing occupancy of petitioners/tenants. Without prejudice to the rights of the respondents, learned counsel submits that he, on instructions, does not press this petition unless otherwise required under the law as the respondents are in process of formulating the mechanism as to the arrears and current rate of rent recoverable from petitioners. The petition in the circumstances having become infructuous is not pressed and is accordingly dismissed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
